mapper.select:
SELECT J.DIAG_JOB_ID ,J.DM_CLCT_ID ,J.DM_ID ,M.DM_NM ,to_char(to_timestamp(C.CLCT_END_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CLCT_DT ,J.STATUS ,J.TOTAL_CNT ,J.PROCESS_CNT ,J.RESULT_CNT ,to_char(to_timestamp(J.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,J.CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(J.START_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as START_DT ,to_char(to_timestamp(J.END_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as END_DT FROM TB_DIAG_JOB J JOIN TB_DATA_MODEL M ON J.DM_ID = M.DM_ID JOIN TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT C ON J.DM_CLCT_ID = C.DM_CLCT_ID WHERE J.STATUS != 'STOPPED'
AND M.DM_NM ILIKE '%' || #{schNm} || '%'
ORDER BY J.CRET_DT DESC

SELECT J.DIAG_JOB_ID ,J.DM_CLCT_ID ,J.DM_ID ,M.DM_NM ,to_char(to_timestamp(C.CLCT_END_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CLCT_DT ,J.STATUS ,J.TOTAL_CNT ,J.PROCESS_CNT ,J.RESULT_CNT ,to_char(to_timestamp(J.CRET_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CRET_DT ,J.CRET_USER_ID ,to_char(to_timestamp(J.START_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as START_DT ,to_char(to_timestamp(J.END_DT,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as END_DT FROM TB_DIAG_JOB J JOIN TB_DATA_MODEL M ON J.DM_ID = M.DM_ID JOIN TB_DATA_MODEL_CLCT C ON J.DM_CLCT_ID = C.DM_CLCT_ID WHERE J.DIAG_JOB_ID = #{diagJobId}
SELECT RESULT_ID, DIAG_JOB_ID, OBJ_NM, ATTR_NM, ATTR_NM_KR, DIAG_TYPE, DIAG_DETAIL, STD_VALUE, ACTUAL_VALUE FROM TB_DIAG_RESULT WHERE DIAG_JOB_ID = #{diagJobId} ORDER BY OBJ_NM, ATTR_NM

SELECT OBJ_NM as "objNm" ,COUNT(DISTINCT ATTR_NM) as "issueColCnt" ,COUNT(*) as "issueCnt" ,COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE DIAG_TYPE = 'TERM_NOT_EXIST') as "termNotExistCnt" ,COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE DIAG_TYPE = 'TERM_KR_NM_MISMATCH') as "termKrNmMismatchCnt" ,COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE DIAG_TYPE = 'DATA_TYPE_MISMATCH') as "dataTypeMismatchCnt" ,COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE DIAG_TYPE = 'DATA_LEN_MISMATCH') as "dataLenMismatchCnt" FROM TB_DIAG_RESULT WHERE DIAG_JOB_ID = #{diagJobId} GROUP BY OBJ_NM ORDER BY OBJ_NM

SELECT A.OBJ_NM as "objNm" ,(SELECT O.OBJ_NM_KR FROM TB_DATA_MODEL_OBJ O WHERE O.DM_CLCT_ID = A.DM_CLCT_ID AND O.OBJ_NM = A.OBJ_NM LIMIT 1) as "objNmKr" ,A.ATTR_NM as "attrNm" ,A.ATTR_NM_KR as "attrNmKr" ,A.DATA_TYPE as "actualDataType" ,A.DATA_LEN as "actualDataLen" ,A.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN as "actualDataDecimalLen" ,T.TERMS_NM as "stdTermsNm" ,D.DATA_TYPE as "stdDataType" ,D.DATA_LEN as "stdDataLen" ,D.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN as "stdDataDecimalLen" ,STRING_AGG(DISTINCT R.DIAG_TYPE, ',' ORDER BY R.DIAG_TYPE) as "diagTypes" FROM TB_DATA_MODEL_ATTR A LEFT JOIN TB_DIAG_RESULT R ON R.DIAG_JOB_ID = #{diagJobId} AND R.OBJ_NM = A.OBJ_NM AND R.ATTR_NM = A.ATTR_NM LEFT JOIN TB_TERMS T ON T.TERMS_ENG_ABRV_NM = A.ATTR_NM LEFT JOIN TB_DOMAIN D ON D.DOMAIN_NM = T.DOMAIN_NM WHERE A.DM_CLCT_ID = (SELECT DM_CLCT_ID FROM TB_DIAG_JOB WHERE DIAG_JOB_ID = #{diagJobId}) GROUP BY A.OBJ_NM, A.DM_CLCT_ID, A.ATTR_NM, A.ATTR_NM_KR, A.DATA_TYPE, A.DATA_LEN, A.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN, T.TERMS_NM, D.DATA_TYPE, D.DATA_LEN, D.DATA_DECIMAL_LEN ORDER BY A.OBJ_NM, A.ATTR_NM
